text.title: Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management and Templates Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: write-template
step.action: Author index template (mappings + settings + policy ref + rollover_alias).

step.name: write-ilm-policy
step.action: Compose ILM policy with hot / warm / cold / delete phases.

step.name: bootstrap-write-alias
step.action: Create initial index `logs-000001` with `is_write_index: true` alias `logs-write`.

step.name: wire-ingest
step.action: Point output to the write alias, not the index.

step.name: verify-rollover
step.action: Force-rollover via `_rollover` API; verify phase progression via `_ilm/explain`.
